conflictOfInterest.details: No conflict of interest was identified. The accountable principal github:VSBDev also operated the authoring agent, which the founding-stage policy permits; this review is a fresh isolated agent run with a unique run ID and did not inspect prior review or adjudication artifacts or any GitHub review body.

evidenceChecked: Detached HEAD and GitHub PR #3 headRefOid both equal b4a208e4745c80b101fb58a6f2fc5ce42e34cb16; the frozen manifest identifies PREM-LPP-001 version 0.1.4.
content/010-orientation.md, content/020-diagnostic.md, content/030-concept.md, content/040-worked-example.md, and content/050-misconception.md
references.json#source-premed-knowledge-graph source use, rights basis/evidence, displayed license, locator, and dated agentAccess record
claims.json, glossary.json, and ATTRIBUTION.md for identity, scope, original-synthesis statement, CC BY 4.0 grant, and author-agent disclosure
course/PREMED-KNOWLEDGE-GRAPH.md sections 2, 3, 5.1, 5.2, and 6 plus site/data/premed-graph.json route-resolution and requirement records
site/data/lessons/PREM-LPP-001.json, site/data/premed-lessons.json, site/data/premed-progress.json, and lesson-commons discovery behavior

Live installed Chrome audit of the real draft artifact: chrome/title/meta, no-script fallback, print, narrow 390px reflow, 200%-equivalent reflow, attribution digests, keyboard focus return, semantic order, and horizontal overflow

Live assessment audit of item-map-order and item-route-plan: labels, text controls, stimulus association/order, after-attempt feedback, untimed retry path, printed stimuli, answer guidance, and hierarchy rubric
Targeted protocol tests for production compilation, semantic media rendering, inert-content boundaries, claim/source-note publication gates, and expressive-reuse rights gates
Targeted browser regressions for draft pending-review publication state, narrow drawer focus return, and mobile horizontal-overflow prevention
Pack-scoped unsafe-content and secret-pattern scan excluding all prior reviews and adjudication paths; only the two declared HTTPS source and terms URLs were found
Original-expression comparison against the cited graph specification; longest exact overlaps were bounded route identifiers or short factual field phrases, not copied instructional expression

findings.finding: The real artifact remains status draft with sourceConfidence pending-review. Installed Chrome renders DRAFT LESSON CANDIDATE and Not published in live chrome, uses draft-specific title and description metadata, never shows the open-lesson banner or access label, and prints DRAFT LESSON CANDIDATE · NOT PUBLISHED with pending-review confidence. With JavaScript disabled, the generic fallback says not to infer publication. Discovery data records zero published lessons, zero covered outcomes, no publishedLessonIds for the mapped outcome, and the lesson commons exposes no Open reviewed lesson link for this draft.

Source order and headings provide a coherent nonvisual route; every hierarchy and edge relationship is also expressed in sentences, lists, or tables, and no outcome depends on color, position, hover, drag, sound, motion, timing, or physical manipulation. The production reader preserves reading and print order, labels bounded guided overflow, supports keyboard scene/frame navigation and focus return, respects reduced motion, and exposes continuous reading. The real attribution, including every long SHA-256 string, reflowed at 390 CSS pixels (the repository's 200%-zoom-equivalent constraint) without page or container overflow.

The route-plan stimulus is learner-visible before its labelled textarea, is programmatically associated through aria-describedby, and survives print with answer guidance. The live hierarchy response control is keyboard-operable and labelled, while rubric-map-order now measures the observable containment order domain → module → topic. All four checks are untimed, retakeable, and accompanied by reasoning and recovery guidance; their text-only route assesses the same map-reading operations as the visual map interface would.

The route-instrumentation boundary is explicit and repeated where learners apply it: a non-empty tag filter is not an implemented route; PW-US, PW-BIO, and PW-QNT are identified as instrumented for curriculum version 1.0; PW-UK and PW-ES remain documented but uninstrumented; and the assessment requires a current route-status check before route resolution. This prevents an accessibility alternative or condensed assessment route from silently turning content tags into completion or admissions claims.

The pack uses one identified local project source for factual reference only. Its creator, publisher, version/date, URL, locator, displayed CC BY 4.0 basis, concrete facts-only use statement, and current checked-no-agent-restriction-found record are complete. The lesson's structure, examples, questions, wording, and tables do not closely track the source's protected expression. There are no quotations, adapted media, datasets, human-only sources, third-party assets, or license exceptions; the original lesson grant and author/agent attribution are explicit.

No secrets, credentials, personal medical information, identifiable learner or patient data, copyrighted answer-bank material, remote embeds, raw active markup, executable notebooks, unsafe TeX, path traversal, or active assets were found. Noor and the diagnostic fragments are expressly fictional and collect no learner data. The reader stores only optional presentation preferences locally; responses remain in the current page and are not recorded or transmitted. Author provenance names the accountable principal and complete agent identity, run ID, version, and instructions digest, while correctly describing those disclosures as attested rather than independently verified.

limitations: This is an accessibility-and-rights evidence and policy review, not legal advice. Copyright, privacy, consent, and license conclusions may vary by jurisdiction; qualified counsel remains necessary if future reuse relies on an exception, private permission, or uncertain ownership.

Manual testing used installed headless Chrome plus source inspection and targeted automation. It did not include every browser, operating system, screen reader, voice-control system, braille display, high-contrast mode, or human usability study, so automated and manual passes are evidence rather than proof of universal accessibility.

The candidate contains no image, SVG, declarative diagram, audio, video, mathematics, chemistry, dataset, structured molecule, third-party asset, or physical practical task. Modality-specific alt, caption, transcript, MathML, media-control, asset-license, and nonphysical-route checks were therefore not applicable to this pack.

Strict isolation excluded every pre-existing file under the pack reviews directory, every adjudication artifact, and every GitHub review body. This review therefore makes no statement about earlier review eligibility, quorum, dissent, adjudication, or merge readiness.

Reviewer provenance is disclosed and attested by github:VSBDev, not independently verified. The instructions digest covers the disclosed assignment boundary followed by repository AGENTS.md and the accessibility-rights SKILL.md bytes; it excludes hidden provider or platform instructions.
